arts.sum: Here's how Man City could line up for their Champions League opener against the Nerazzurri. CM: Rodri - City have started impressively despite Rodri's slow opening to the season.

arts.ttl: Rodri gives verdict on Real Madrid transfer speculation
arts.sum: Rodri remains under contract until 2027 and City feel under no pressure in regards to his future. Rodri has insisted he remains solely focused on Manchester City in the face of mounting rumours of interest from Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Rodri DECLARES WAR on UEFA and FIFA over fixture congestion
arts.sum: On Monday, Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson criticised FIFA and UEFA: "Sometimes, nobody asks the players what they think about adding more games so maybe our opinion does not matter. The topic of fixture congestion has been put in the spotlight again inn recent times due to the start of the revamped Champions League, which will see players take part in an increased number of games.

arts.ttl: Man City have two managers battling over the same player as Pep Guardiola conversations revealed
arts.sum: Manchester City play Inter Milan on Wednesday in a double header - in the Champions League at the Etihad Stadium and in the UEFA Youth League over the road at the Joie Stadium.
